name: WooCommerce
one_line: Open-source WordPress ecommerce plugin with a built-in REST API.
self_serve_detail: Free core plugin; generate Consumer Key/Secret in WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > REST API with Read/Write perms in your own store, no cost or approval.
api_surface: REST broad (products, orders, customers, reports, webhooks)

name: BigCommerce
one_line: Hosted SaaS ecommerce platform with REST and GraphQL APIs.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free trial store, then create store-level API account in Settings > API Accounts to get a static access_token (X-Auth-Token); no approval, but live production needs a paid plan. App-level OAuth2 via Developer Portal for public apps.

name: Magento / Adobe Commerce
one_line: Enterprise ecommerce platform (Adobe Commerce PaaS/SaaS and free Magento Open Source).
self_serve_detail: Adobe Commerce proper requires a paid license. Magento Open Source is free and self-hostable: create an Integration in Admin (System > Integrations) to get OAuth 1.0a consumer key/secret + access token/secret with no approval.
api_surface: REST broad + GraphQL (catalog, sales, customers, CMS)

name: Ecwid
one_line: Lightspeed-owned hosted ecommerce platform with a REST API.
self_serve_detail: API access requires a paid store plan (Venture/Business/Unlimited). A custom app in the store's app dashboard yields non-expiring secret/public tokens (Bearer) and client_id/secret; developers can email Ecwid for a free dev-plan upgrade, but no fully open free self-serve path.
api_surface: REST broad (catalog, orders, customers, payments, shipping)

name: Gumroad
one_line: Creator-commerce platform for selling digital products and memberships.
self_serve_detail: Free: create an application in account Settings > Advanced > Applications and generate an access token (Bearer) instantly; no approval or paid plan required. OAuth2 flows (auth code, password, client credentials) also supported.
